goal: Capture voyage economics the generic finance ledger can't, AND write the voyage row back into Wency's real Reis registratie.xlsx — both confirm-before-write.
why: Wency keeps a specialized Excel voyage register the generic finance_entries ledger cannot represent (ADR-006); the 2026-06-29 operator note requires the agent to FILL his actual .xlsx, not only a parallel DB index. Closes REQ-28.
success_criteria: voyage_entries table exists with the 26 real register columns + the 8-company CHECK, RLS on / no policies

A voyage recorded via the agent is confirm-before-write: staging writes nothing; on confirm it inserts a voyage_entries row AND appends a row to the matching year-sheet of Reis registratie.xlsx, re-uploaded in place with all existing sheets/rows preserved

import_voyage_register reads the existing register and stages its historical rows for confirm-before-insert (user-reviewed per ADR-006, the Excel file unmodified); on confirm the reviewed rows land in voyage_entries and undo removes them
Undo of a confirmed voyage deletes the DB row and surfaces that the Excel append is not auto-reverted
The finance page shows a per-company voyage economics drill-down (count + revenue + net) with loading/error/empty states, reusing existing finance design tokens
npx tsc --noEmit passes; all new tests pass

tasks.title: voyage_entries migration + voyageLedger.ts read/aggregate library
acceptance_criteria: Migration creates voyage_entries with id uuid pk, company text not null (CHECK against the 8 entities), the 26 register columns (numeric where numeric, text for codes/notes/dates), source_ref, created_by, status default 'confirmed', created_at; RLS enabled, NO policies; index on (company)
voyageSummary() returns per-company {company, voyageCount, revenue, net} for all 8 seeded at zero plus a consolidated roll-up, only status='confirmed' rows
recordVoyageEntry(input) inserts one row returning {id}; deleteVoyageEntry(id) hard-deletes by id
npx tsc --noEmit passes; voyageLedger.test.ts passes
tasks.action: Write the migration mirroring 0015_finance_entries.sql for RLS/comment/index shape, with the 26 columns in register order (voyage_no..note) per m6-onedrive-discovery.md:49-76 and a voyage_entries_company_check. Build voyageLedger.ts mirroring ledger.ts: VOYAGE_COMPANIES, round2, voyageSummary() seeding all 8 at zero summing revenue/net, recordVoyageEntry, deleteVoyageEntry, types. Test the roll-up against a stubbed supabaseAdmin like ledger.test.ts.

tasks.title: excelRegister.ts adapter: read + append-row + re-serialize the register
acceptance_criteria: readRegister(buffer) parses an .xlsx into {sheetNames, sheets: Record<string,string[][]>}

appendVoyageRow(buffer, year, row) reads the workbook, locates the sheet named exactly year (throws naming available sheets if absent — never silently creates), appends ONE row (26 values in register column order) to the bottom via sheet_add_aoa origin:-1, returns a new .xlsx buffer with all other sheets and existing rows unchanged
Re-serializes with XLSX.write(wb, {type:'buffer', bookType:'xlsx'})
Round-trip test: sheets ['2025','2026'] with 2 data rows in 2026 -> append -> 3 data rows in 2026, 2025 untouched, sheet order preserved
tasks.action: Use the proven read call XLSX.read(buf,{type:"array"}) (onedriveTools.ts:921-923). Define REGISTER_COLUMNS as the 26 ordered field keys (same order as migration + discovery doc). appendVoyageRow maps VoyageRegisterRow to a values array, guards a missing sheet, calls sheet_add_aoa(ws,[values],{origin:-1}), returns the XLSX.write buffer. readRegister returns per-sheet AOA via sheet_to_json header:1. Test builds the workbook with book_new/aoa_to_sheet then exercises appendVoyageRow.

tasks.title: record_voyage_entry tool: definition, stage, confirm (DB insert + xlsx append/re-upload), undo
acceptance_criteria: record_voyage_entry in TOOL_DEFINITIONS with company enum (8 entities), required year (string) and registerItemId (string), the optional voyage fields, additionalProperties false; description states CONFIRMED-BEFORE-WRITE and that it writes to BOTH the finance index AND the Excel register
Calling the tool STAGES a pending_actions row (no write) and returns confirmation_required; summary warns the Excel append is not auto-reverted on undo

On confirm: insert via recordVoyageEntry, download the register by registerItemId, appendVoyageRow, re-upload to the same path/name (overwrite), return undo_data {voyageEntryId, registerItemId, year, appendedRow:true}
Undo deletes the voyage_entries row via deleteVoyageEntry; does NOT auto-revert the xlsx append (mirrors delete_item best-effort)
executeConfirmedAction.test.ts covers routing + a missing registerItemId throwing
tasks.action: Add record_voyage_entry to TOOL_DEFINITIONS (copy record_finance_entry shape) with required company/year/registerItemId + optional VoyageRegisterRow fields. Add it to DESTRUCTIVE and a summarizeAction case (generic stage fall-through). executeConfirmedAction case: recordVoyageEntry then downloadContent(registerItemId) -> appendVoyageRow(buf,year,fields) -> getItem -> uploadFile overwrite; return undo_data. undoAction case calls deleteVoyageEntry, noting the Excel row stays. Add test coverage.

tasks.title: import_voyage_register tool: parse the existing register + stage its rows for confirm-before-insert
acceptance_criteria: import_voyage_register in TOOL_DEFINITIONS with required company enum (8 entities) + registerItemId (string), optional year (string), additionalProperties false; description states CONFIRMED-BEFORE-WRITE, that it reads (read-only, Excel unmodified) and stages parsed rows for user review per ADR-006
import_voyage_register is in the DESTRUCTIVE set

Calling the tool STAGES a pending_actions row (no voyage write): the stage branch downloads the register by registerItemId, calls readRegister, maps each data row (skipping the header) of the selected year-sheet(s) to a VoyageRegisterRow via REGISTER_COLUMNS order, stores rows + company in args, and the summary states the row count and source sheet(s); returns confirmation_required
On confirm: executeConfirmedAction inserts each staged row via recordVoyageEntry with company/createdBy/sourceRef, collects ids, returns undo_data {voyageEntryIds}
Undo deletes every imported row by id via deleteVoyageEntry; returns undone:true
executeConfirmedAction.test.ts covers: confirming inserts one recordVoyageEntry call per parsed row; a missing registerItemId throws
tasks.action: After Task 3's symbols: add import_voyage_register to TOOL_DEFINITIONS (required company/registerItemId, optional year), to DESTRUCTIVE, and a summarizeAction case. Add an explicit stage branch: downloadContent -> readRegister -> map data rows via REGISTER_COLUMNS to staged args + count summary -> stagePendingAction. Confirm case loops staged rows calling recordVoyageEntry, returns undo_data{voyageEntryIds}. Undo loops voyageEntryIds calling deleteVoyageEntry. Add tests.

Finance page renders a Voyage economics section: per-company cards (8, canonical order) with voyage count + revenue + net, a consolidated header, and loading/error/empty states, reusing existing finance CSS classes and helpers — no new colors/fonts
record_voyage_entry is in REVERSIBLE_TOOLS so a confirmed voyage card shows Undo
Works at 375px and 1440px (reuse fin-company-grid)
